message:
fix(security): fail-closed boundaries, path traversal, and unbounded pushes in 4 modules

- sybil_defense: `> 0.8` → `>= 0.8` for Sybil group detection threshold (fail-closed at boundary)
- barrier_primitives: bound per-node barrier list with push_bounded (MAX_BARRIERS_PER_NODE=256)
- repro_bundle_export: reject `..` segments and backslashes in EvidenceRef path traversal check
- vef_perf_budget_gate: bound audit_log (MAX_AUDIT_LOG=4096), add is_finite() guard on CV stability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
